comparison_rows.reading: The replacement only matters if the wider layer stays bounded rather than drifting into generic widen.
Core stability must survive the guarded branch addition.
Guarded targets must also survive, otherwise the wider layer should not replace the old one.
The new layer is only lawful because the mixed connector/MPO branch stays outside.

interpretation: The 10-row layer can replace the 7-row baseline for the next bounded pilot because the guarded branch addition remained stable.
This replacement does not erase the guarded boundary on the three added branch rows.
Formal training and signal rights remain closed.
